case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE ALEX PADILLA BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE ALEX PADILLA BAIL BONDS $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,203.00
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE MUNTER JUDGMENT OF JUN-18-2001 SET ASIDE
